name: Oven Kalua Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the turkey.
2. Line a large baking pan with foil.
3. Wash ti leaves and banana leaf, removing the fibrous parts of the veins.
4. Line the baking pan with ti leaves radiating from the center; place half of the banana leaf at the bottom of the pan.
5. Place the turkey on the leaves.
6. Rub the remaining ingredients (butter, salt, and liquid smoke) evenly over the inside and outside of the turkey.
7. Place the remaining half of the banana leaf over the turkey; fold the leaves around the turkey.
8. Crimp the foil around the turkey and cover the pan tightly with additional foil.
9. Roast in an electric oven at 375°F for 6 hours.
10. Shred the turkey, adding enough of the pan liquid to moisten the meat. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
